explanation: At most one magnitude can hold for event:venezuela-yumare-2026:mainshock (within tolerance). Conflicting values: 7.1 M [6 sources, syndication x10, OUTLET] vs 7.5 M [4 sources, OFFICIAL/OUTLET]. Resolved by provenance in reconciliation; the superseded value is retained.
Within source ref-17, the cumulative casualty_injured count decreases without explanation: 45 (at 19:30Z) then 30 (at 20:45Z). Flagged for review.

Section routing: Simon Bolivar International Airport is an airport, an infrastructure facility, so its damage belongs in the Infrastructure section, not Building. Building Damage covers individual structures; Infrastructure Impact covers transport and lifelines, even when a source calls an airport a 'terminal building'.
